headline: If You Invested $1,000 In Apple A Decade Ago, Here's How Much You'd Have Now

headline: Elon Musk's Mother Suggests She May 'Vote Ten Times' – Or More

headline: Google Delivers New AI Features To Maps, Google Earth, Waze Apps
summary: Google has added new generative AI capabilities to its Google Maps, Waze and Google Earth offerings through the company's Gemini AI model.
